title: Moroccan Chocolate Tagine
description: A rich and exotic dessert inspired by the flavors of Morocco, featuring a dense and moist chocolate cake filled with a sweet and sticky tagine sauce.
instructions: Combine the dense, malty, and moroccan ingredients in a large mixing bowl.
Add the chocolate and mix until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a greased tagine and bake for 30-40 minutes.
While the cake is baking, prepare the tagine sauce by combining the tagine ingredients in a small saucepan.
Heat the sauce over medium heat until it thickens and caramelizes.
Remove the cake from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Drizzle the tagine sauce over the top of the cake and serve warm.
